servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Read/write repos, issues, PRs, and files on GitHub
servers.envNote: Needs GITHUB_TOKEN env var (a GitHub personal access token)

servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Read and write files on your local machine

servers.name: Fetch / Web
servers.description: Fetch URLs and scrape web pages

servers.name: PostgreSQL
servers.description: Query and inspect a PostgreSQL database
servers.envNote: Pass your connection string: /mcp install postgres postgresql://user:pass@localhost/db

servers.name: SQLite
servers.description: Query a local SQLite database file
servers.envNote: Pass your .db file path: /mcp install sqlite /path/to/db.sqlite

servers.name: Notion
servers.description: Read and write Notion pages and databases

servers.name: Puppeteer
servers.description: Control a Chrome browser — automate clicks, fill forms, take screenshots

servers.name: Playwright
servers.description: Full browser automation with Playwright — supports Chrome, Firefox, and WebKit

servers.name: Memory / Knowledge Graph
servers.description: Persistent memory across conversations using a local knowledge graph

servers.name: Brave Search
servers.description: Search the web using the Brave Search API

servers.name: Exa Search
servers.description: Semantic web search and content retrieval powered by Exa AI
servers.envNote: Needs EXA_API_KEY from exa.ai (free tier available)

servers.name: Google Maps
servers.description: Search places, get directions, and geocode addresses

servers.name: Sequential Thinking
servers.description: Structured multi-step reasoning for complex problems

servers.name: Everything (demo)
servers.description: Demo MCP server that showcases all MCP features and tool types

servers.name: FFmpeg
servers.description: Convert, probe, and manipulate media files with FFmpeg — transcode, trim, crop, resize, extract audio/video, overlay, concat, GIF, screenshots, metadata, speed, volume
servers.envNote: Requires ffmpeg installed on the system PATH

servers.name: DaVinci Resolve
servers.description: Control DaVinci Resolve — project management, timeline editing, media import, color grading, and rendering via the Resolve scripting API
servers.envNote: Requires DaVinci Resolve 18+ running. Use /resolve setup for configuration help.
